branch_map.kinematic_core: SUSY-agnostic, machine-verified (44+24), untouched by all dynamics results
branch_map.susy_minimal_slice: EXCLUDED (slice family, not model class): unification x proton decay + obstruction map
branch_map.nonsusy_variant: ALIVE: PS 210-compatible marginal (4.3e33, Hyper-K window, TRIPLE-TESTED against the computed 210 and 126bar spectra); G_LR alive (tau ~ 1e36) but requires the 45-adjoint route (210-only vacuum tree-dead, epsilon lever exhausted); source selection leaves the scale-decoupled instanton-type tower as the only quantified scenario; the normalized contact content is branch-independent by the invariance theorem (M_* branch-local)
branch_map.string_conditional: three pricing cards, unpromoted, must not be cited as evidence

kill_bank.statement: fourth sequential chiral family kills the a-priori bound N_fam <= 3 (self-carried-index principle)
Dirac neutrinos remove the Majorana contact target; essentiality posterior-wide
unification x proton decay excludes the slice family; obstruction map recorded
tau(p -> e+ pi0) = 4.3e33 vs 2.4e34: dead or inside the Hyper-K discovery window
e+ pi0 dominance; G_LR at 1e36 partially probeable; K+ nubar dominance would disfavor the branch
thermal unflavored leptogenesis fails by ~1.5 orders, wrong central sign; x3-10 boost -> 34-45%
odd-R spurion ceiling eps < 4.4e-4 (refreshed windows); light-sector silence structural
instanton source requires N2, N3 ABOVE the intermediate gauge scale (39x, 4.8e3x on PS): coexistence correlation falsifiable
zero-mode selectivity gap Delta S >= 6.6 (refreshed) / 3.2 (loose) at M_s = 2e16
SUSY-breaking bridge: G_LR window log10 M_SS in [10.30, 15.55]; PS bridge EMPTY (structural)
Z_178 diagnostic retired: misses the refreshed card by 4.1e-3 rad vs the 5.4e-5 window (76x)
K4 TRIPLE-TESTED: the Hyper-K window survives the computed 210 spectrum (tree positivity 39/250, tau = 4.25e33 all percentiles) AND the computed 126bar spectrum (45/150 viable, same tau)

kill_bank.branch: non-SUSY LR chain (refresh, CORRECTED by the ratio scan)
kill_bank.statement: the 210-only LR vacuum IS a tree-level local minimum in rare coupling regions at vev ratios near 0.6-0.7 (8/8800 sampled; He-Meljanac 1986 reproduced at claim level); the earlier fixed-ratio negative (0/249 at a/p = 0.8) was an artifact of the fixed ratio; the epsilon invariant neither rescues nor kills any sampled point; the adjoint route is an ALTERNATIVE, not a necessity

K6 REPLACED by the branch-tagged rerun: ~6x harder (suppression 0.165, P = 0/4000 unflavored, boost sweet spot x60) but the gravitino ceiling dissolves by the branch -- a soft constraint on the source scenario, not a kill

K8 UPGRADED to a branch requirement: lock tension 9x/159x + type-II deficit 3.7/7.3 orders + leptogenesis floor leave the scale-decoupled instanton-type source as the only quantified scenario; D3 itself remains unpromoted

K2 STRENGTHENED by the kernel refit: the theta_23 tension is a frozen-anchor property (exact Majorana absorption at unchanged kernels; a 5% Y_e perturbation absorbs it alone) and contact essentiality is lifted to the perturbation level (cf never below 0.01 over 1000 refits with eps up to 0.3)
the zeta-invariance theorem: the normalized contact content is exactly invariant under Dirac rescaling; only M_* is branch-local (the 'what would not falsify' remark is now a theorem)
